scripts.package:linux: mkdir -p release && cp src-tauri/target/release/kaizen release/ && tar -czf release/Kaizen-linux-x64.tar.gz -C release kaizen && rm release/kaizen && echo 'Done → release/Kaizen-linux-x64.tar.gz'
scripts.package:macos: mkdir -p release && cp -r src-tauri/target/release/bundle/macos/Kaizen.app release/ && cd release && zip -r Kaizen-macos-arm64.zip Kaizen.app && rm -rf Kaizen.app && echo 'Done → release/Kaizen-macos-arm64.zip'
scripts.package:windows: mkdir -p release && cp src-tauri/target/release/kaizen.exe release/ 2>/dev/null; powershell Compress-Archive -Path release/kaizen.exe -DestinationPath release/Kaizen-windows-x64.zip 2>/dev/null; echo 'Done'
